test_cases.prompt: 为这篇文章规划 5 张小黑正文配图，先不要生图
test_cases.expected_behavior: return a 4-8-shot 16:9 plan with one cognition anchor and one original metaphor per image

test_cases.prompt: 为‘下班后学习’配小黑正文插图
test_cases.expected_behavior: use 小黑 as the central action on a white 16:9 hand-drawn canvas with restrained annotations

test_cases.prompt: 为‘下班后学习’配一张 3:4 黑白铅笔人物叙事图，顶部留标题空间
test_cases.expected_behavior: use pencil_narrative only because the user explicitly requested it; use a non-specific person and keep the 小黑 default mode available

test_cases.prompt: 做带标题的数据报告封面
照着原仓库的素材鱼构图画一张
test_cases.expected_behavior: preserve the principle but invent a new metaphor rather than copy an example composition
